delivery: Kapruka delivers gifts across Sri Lanka; always confirm city against kapruka_list_delivery_cities before checkout.
Use the exact city name from Kapruka's delivery list — spelling matters for order creation.
Same-day or next-day options depend on product and city; mention timing when user is last-minute.
search_tips: Search concrete product nouns (flower bouquet, chocolate hamper) not vague phrases like 'gift'.
Run separate kapruka_search_products calls for each distinct item in a package.
Only use category filters from kapruka_list_categories — wrong categories return zero results.
